fullDescription: Sakinah.family helps seekers and families move through a private, consent-first marriage process. Hafiz prepares onboarding and verification, Watim keeps matches explainable, Adil protects consent before rooms open, and Sabr keeps pressure and family-boundary risks visible. The Android app is the primary service surface; the web app remains the trust contract and account fallback.
contentNotes: No in-app external checkout links on Android.
